channel.title: Microsoft Learn - in Intune
channel.description: The latest updates from Microsoft Learn in Intune

item.title: Enable MDM automatic enrollment for Windows - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Enable Intune automatic enrollment for Windows devices joining or registering with your Microsoft Entra ID.

item.title: Configure Microsoft Defender for Endpoint with Intune and onboard devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Connect Microsoft Defender for Endpoint to Intune, onboard devices by platform, and configure compliance and Conditional Access policies that use device risk levels to control access to corporate resources.

item.title: Windows device enrollment guide for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Enroll Windows devices using Automatic enrollment, Windows Autopilot, group policy, and co-management enrollment options in Microsoft Intune. Decide which enrollment method to use, and get an overview of the administrator and end user tasks to enroll devices.

item.title: Android device enrollment guide for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Enroll Android and Android Enterprise corporate-owned work profile, personally owned devices with a work profile, fully managed, AOSP, and dedicated devices in Microsoft Intune. Decide which enrollment method to use, and get an overview of the administrator and end user tasks to enroll devices.

item.title: Encrypt Windows devices with BitLocker using Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Microsoft Intune policy to manage BitLocker encryption on Windows devices, including silent encryption and Personal Data Encryption.

item.title: Add the Company Portal for macOS App - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Add the macOS Company Portal app.

item.title: Add corporate identifiers to Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Add corporate identifiers (enrollment method, IMEI, and serial numbers) to Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Deploy Remote Help with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Follow the steps to deploy Remote Help with Microsoft Intune on Windows, macOS, and Android Enterprise.

item.title: Overview of enrollment restrictions - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the enrollment restrictions available in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Planning guide to move to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Plan, design, implement, adopt, and move to Microsoft Intune. Get guidance and advice to determine goals, use-case scenarios and requirements, and create rollout and communication plans, support, testing, and validation plans.

item.title: How to Configure the Intune Company Portal Apps, Company Portal Website, and Intune App - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how you can configure the Intune Company Portal apps, Company Portal website, and Intune app.

item.title: macOS device enrollment guide for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Enroll macOS devices using device enrollment, automated device enrollment (DEP), and Apple Configurator enrollment options in Microsoft Intune. Decide which enrollment method to use, and get an overview of the administrator and end user tasks to enroll devices.

item.title: Add Microsoft 365 Apps to Windows Devices Using Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how you can use Microsoft Intune to install Microsoft 365 apps on Windows devices.

item.title: Questions with policies and profiles in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Common questions, answers, and scenarios with device policies and profiles in Microsoft Intune. Learn more about profile changes not applying to users or devices, how long it takes for new policies to deploy, which settings apply when there are conflicts, what happens when you delete or remove a profile, and more.

item.title: Set up account driven Apple User Enrollment - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Set up account driven Apple User Enrollment for personal devices enrolling in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Tutorial - Walkthrough the Microsoft Intune Admin Center - Microsoft Intune
item.description: In this tutorial, you will tour Microsoft Intune in the Microsoft Intune admin center to better understand how to accomplish tasks.

item.title: Set up enrollment for macOS devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Set up enrollment for macOS devices in Intune.

item.title: Encrypt macOS devices with FileVault using Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Microsoft Intune policy to configure and manage FileVault disk encryption on macOS devices, including Setup Assistant enforcement and comprehensive recovery key management.

item.title: Deployment guide to manage macOS devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn the recommended processes to manage macOS devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Integrate Microsoft Defender for Endpoint with Intune for Device Compliance - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Integrate Microsoft Defender for Endpoint with Microsoft Intune as a Mobile Threat Defense (MTD) solution to enforce device compliance and prevent security breaches.

item.title: Deployment guide to manage iOS/iPadOS devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: A guide to managing iOS/iPadOS devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Deploy endpoint detection and response policy with Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Microsoft Intune endpoint security policies to configure and deploy Microsoft Defender for Endpoint EDR capabilities to Windows, macOS, and Linux devices.

item.title: Set up web based device enrollment - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Set up web-based device enrollment to manage user-owned iOS/iPadOS devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Enroll personal devices in Intune with Android Enterprise work profile management - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Set up Intune for personal devices and bring-your-own-device scenarios using Android Enterprise work profile management.

item.title: Deployment guide to manage Android devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn the recommended processes to manage Android devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Monitor results of your device compliance policies in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use the device compliance dashboard to understand overall device compliance the per policy and per setting device compliance results.

item.title: Overview of Apple device enrollment in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Utilize Apple device enrollment to enroll and manage user-owned iOS/iPadOS devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Protect data and devices with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the Intune capabilities that can help you protect your devices and data against unauthorized access and other threats.

item.title: Endpoint security in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to manage endpoint security in Microsoft Intune. Configure security policies, deploy baselines, and integrate with Defender for Endpoint to protect devices.

item.title: Manage Intune devices with Android device administrator - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Android device administrator with Intune to manage devices.

item.title: Deployment guide for Linux device management - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use our platform deployment guide to set up Linux device management in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Linux device enrollment guide for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Enroll Linux devices in Intune using the Intune app. Set an overview of the administrator and end user tasks to enroll devices.

item.title: Deployment guide for Windows device management - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use our platform deployment guide to set up Windows device management in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Enroll a Windows device - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to enroll a Windows device into Microsoft Intune. Follow this step-by-step evaluation guide to test device enrollment and verify it in the Intune admin center.

item.title: Mobile Application Management (MAM) and Android Enterprise Personally-Owned Work Profiles in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: See the available features when deciding to use Mobile Application Management (MAM) and/or Android Enterprise personally-owned work profiles for personal or BYOD Android devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Back up and restore iOS/iPadOS - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about backup and restore scenarios for iOS/iPadOS devices.

item.title: Endpoint management services and solutions at Microsoft - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Microsoft Intune is a family of on-premises products and cloud services. It includes Intune, Configuration Manager, co-management, Endpoint Analytics, Windows Autopilot, and the admin center to manage cloud devices and on on-premises.

item.title: Centrally manage Admin Tasks - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Centrally manage admin tasks in Microsoft Intune. Use the unified Admin tasks view to organize and act on administrative tasks from Device Offboarding, Endpoint Privilege Management, and more.

item.title: Secure Your Corporate Data in Intune with Microsoft Edge for Business - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Secure your corporate data in Microsoft Intune with Microsoft Edge for Business across all platforms.

item.title: Avoid policy conflicts - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to avoid policy conflicts when creating and deploying new policies.

item.title: Help Desk Troubleshooting Dashboard - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Help desk staff use the troubleshooting pane to solve users' technical problems.

item.title: How to Use Intune in Environments Without Google Mobile Services - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use Intune in environments without Google Mobile Services.

item.title: Configure Defender for Endpoint Web protection on Android devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Intune policy to manage Microsoft Defender for Endpoint web protection settings on Android devices managed by Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Set up Microsoft Entra ID - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to create and prepare your Microsoft Entra tenant for an education environment.

item.title: Configure applications with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to configure applications with Microsoft Intune in preparation for device deployment.

item.title: How to Monitor App Protection Policies - Microsoft Intune
item.description: This article describes how to monitor app protection policies in Intune.

item.title: Education device enrollment with Windows Autopilot and Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to join Microsoft Entra ID and enroll in Intune using Windows Autopilot.

item.title: Zero Trust deployment approach with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn the recommended seven-layer deployment progression for implementing Zero Trust device security with Microsoft Intune, from app protection to endpoint data loss prevention.

item.title: Move Android devices from device administrator to personally owned work profile management - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Move Android devices from device administrator to personally owned work profile management in Intune.

item.title: Education Windows device enrollment with provisioning packages - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about how to enroll Windows devices with provisioning packages using SUSPCs and Windows Configuration Designer.

item.title: UI updates for Intune end-user apps - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Find out what has changed in UI for apps that work on end-user devices with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: What is Intune for Education? - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about Intune for Education and how it is different from the full Intune management experience.

item.title: Update Microsoft 365 apps with the settings catalog in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use settings catalog in Microsoft Intune to update Microsoft 365 apps to the latest version, and choose how frequently Office checks for updates. See the device registry keys that are updated when an Intune policy to Office update is applied.

item.title: Move from Android device administrator to mobile application management - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Microsoft Intune to set up mobile application management, an alternative option to Android device administrator that focuses on app protection and doesn't require device enrollment.

item.title: Audit, export or delete personal data collected by Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to audit, export, or delete personal data that is collected by Intune.

item.title: Manage devices with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Overview of device management capabilities in Intune for Education, including remote actions, remote assistance, and inventory/reporting.

item.title: Configure and secure devices with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to configure policies with Microsoft Intune in preparation for device deployment.

item.title: Introduction to the tutorial for deploying and managing devices in a school - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Introduction to deployment and management of devices in education environments.

item.title: Use Windows Holographic devices with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use Microsoft Intune to manage and complete different tasks on devices running Windows Holographic for Business and HoloLens. You can configure the Company Portal app, create a compliance policy, customize OMA-URI settings, deploy apps, categorize devices in groups, create profiles, restrict devices, enable software updates, set terms and conditions, configure VPN and Wi-Fi settings, and use Hello for Business.

item.title: Compliance in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about compliance, dependencies, and features in Microsoft Intune supporting data protection and regulatory requirements.

item.title: Common Education configuration overview - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about common configuration used by Education organizations in Intune.

item.title: Use StageNow logs on Android Zebra devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: See common issues and resolutions when using StageNow on Android devices with Microsoft Intune. Also learn how to get logs, and see examples of how to read the logs for success or errors.

item.title: Optional diagnostic data that is collected by Intune client apps - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the optional diagnostic data that Intune Client apps collect.

item.title: View and correct personal data collected by Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to view and correct personal data that's been collected by Intune.

item.title: Management functionalities for Surface devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about the management capabilities offered to Surface devices, including firmware management and the Surface Management Portal.

item.title: Common Education iPads with no user affinity configuration - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about common iPads with no user affinity configuration used by Education organizations in Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Rename Device - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use the Rename device remote action in Microsoft Intune to update the device name shown in the admin center. Useful for standardizing naming conventions, managing shared devices, and improving inventory clarity.

item.title: Education device enrollment with Apple Configurator and Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to bulk enroll devices with Apple Configurator.

item.title: Education device enrollment with Automated Device Enrollment and Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to automatically enroll devices through Apple School Manager with Automated Device Enrollment during Setup Assistant on iOS/iPadOS devices.

item.title: What's new in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Find out what's new in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Common Education iPads restrictions configuration - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about common iPads restrictions configuration used by Education organizations in Intune.

item.title: Use Intune to remediate vulnerabilities found by Microsoft Defender for Endpoint - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Integrate Microsoft Defender Vulnerability Management with Intune to create security tasks, track remediation, and reduce vulnerability exposure across managed devices.

item.title: Education iOS device enrollment with Company Portal - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to enroll iOS/iPadOS devices using Company Portal.

item.title: Use derived credentials for mobile devices with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use a third-party partners derived credential as an authentication method for Intune.

item.title: Set up automated device enrollment (ADE) for iOS/iPadOS - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to enroll corporate-owned iOS/iPadOS devices into Microsoft Intune with Apple Automated Device Enrollment (ADE).

item.title: iOS/iPadOS device enrollment guide for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Enroll iOS and iPadOS devices using user and device enrollment, automated device enrollment (DEP), and Apple Configurator in Microsoft Intune. Decide which enrollment method to use, and get an overview of the administrator and end user tasks to enroll devices.

item.title: Create and Deploy App Protection Policies - Microsoft Intune
item.description: This article describes how to create and assign Microsoft Intune app protection policies.

item.title: Overview of Apple User Enrollment in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Utilize Apple User Enrollment to enroll and manage user-owned iOS/iPadOS devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Step 5 – Enroll devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Enroll Android, Android Enterprise, iOS, iPadOS, Linux, macOS, and Windows devices in Intune.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Collect Diagnostics - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to collect diagnostics with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Add custom settings to Android DA devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Add or create a custom profile for Android device administrator (DA) devices in Microsoft Intune. Create a WiFi profile with a preshared key, create a per-app VPN profile, or allow/block apps for Samsung Knox Standard devices.

item.title: App Protection Policies Overview - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how Microsoft Intune app protection policies help protect your company data and prevent data loss.

item.title: Device compliance policies in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Overview of Microsoft Intune device compliance, including tenant-wide compliance policy settings and device compliance policies.

item.title: iOS/iPadOS App Protection Policy Settings - Microsoft Intune
item.description: This article describes the iOS/iPadOS app protection policy (APP) settings for iOS/iPadOS devices.

item.title: Add Apps to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to add apps to Microsoft Intune so you can assign apps to users and devices. Intune supports a wide range of app types.

item.title: App Configuration Policies for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use app configuration policies on an iOS/iPadOS or Android device in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Data Protection Framework Using App Protection Policies - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how app protection policies ensure an organization's data remains safe or contained in a managed app, regardless of whether the device is enrolled.

item.title: Monitor App Information and Assignments - Microsoft Intune
item.description: After you assign an app to users or devices, use this information to help you monitor the app's status.

item.title: Configuration Policies for Intune App SDK Managed Apps - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to configure policies for Intune App SDK managed apps.

item.title: Use Microsoft Tunnel VPN with iOS/iPad devices that don't enroll with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Add support for Mobile Application Management (MAM) for iOS to the Microsoft Tunnel Gateway. Tunnel support for MAM expands access to your organizational resources for devices that can't or haven't enrolled with Microsoft Intune. Admins should use this article to create policies that support per-app VPN in line of business (LOB) apps.

item.title: Use Microsoft Tunnel VPN with Android devices that don't enroll with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Add support for Mobile Application Management (MAM) for Android to the Microsoft Tunnel Gateway. Tunnel support for MAM expands access to your organizational resources for devices that can't or haven't enrolled with Microsoft Intune

item.title: Using Azure Virtual Desktop multi-session with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Guidelines for using Azure Virtual Desktop multi-session with Microsoft Intune

item.title: Bulk enrollment for Windows devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Create a bulk enrollment package for Microsoft Intune

item.title: Configure device configuration profiles in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Add or configure a device configuration profile in Microsoft Intune. Select the platform type, configure the settings, and add a scope tag. Learn more about applicability rules, and the policy refresh cycle times.

item.title: Device features and settings in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Overview of the different Microsoft Intune device profiles. Get info on GPO, features, restrictions, email, wifi, VPN, education, certificates, upgrade Windows 10/11, BitLocker and Microsoft Defender, and custom device configuration settings in the Microsoft Intune admin center. Use these profiles to manage and protect data and devices in your company.

item.title: Apple device feature settings in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: See all the settings to configure iOS, iPadOS, and macOS devices for AirPrint, home screen layout, app notifications, shared devices, single sign-on, and web content filter settings in Microsoft Intune. Use these settings in a device configuration profile to configure iOS, iPadOS, and macOS devices to use these Apple features on your devices.

item.title: Create a Wi-Fi profile for devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: See the steps to create a Wi-Fi device configuration profile in Microsoft Intune. Create profiles for Android device administrator, Android Enterprise, Android kiosk, iOS, iPadOS, macOS, Windows 10/11, and Windows Holographic for Business. Use these profiles to create a WiFi connection to use certificates, choose an EAP type, select an authentication method, enable a proxy, and more.

item.title: Wi-Fi settings for Windows devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Add or create Wi-Fi configuration profile using Wi-Fi settings for Windows 10/11 client devices in Microsoft Intune. You can configure basic settings, or enterprise level settings.

item.title: Configure WiFi settings for Apple devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Add or create a Wi-Fi configuration profile on iOS/iPadOS and macOS devices using Wi-Fi configuration settings in Microsoft Intune. Configure the connection details, authentication methods, SSIDs, security types, and proxy settings.

item.title: Add VPN settings to devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: On Android device administrator, Android Enterprise, iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and Windows devices, use built-in settings to create virtual private network (VPN) connections in Microsoft Intune.
